name: Where Have You Been?
overview: Widower Ramzi is going to marry Nisrine who is a lot younger than him. This shocks his son Jad and his girlfriend Sila as well as the entire family, who will do their best to get rid of Nisrine and keep her way from the family.

trailers.title: Wein Kenti - Upcoming On LBCI & LDC - وين كنتي ؟
